caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing a striped shirt and large over-the-ear headphones, is centered in the frame against a plain white wall. To her left, yellow and blue curtains hang, and a light-colored flat surface is visible behind her on the right. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the lower-left corner of the scene. Across the sequence, the woman is speaking, and her facial expressions shift. Initially, her eyes are closed and her mouth is open. She then opens her eyes and continues speaking. Her expression transitions to one of slight confusion or skepticism, with her brows furrowed and lips pressed together, before she returns to speaking with a neutral gaze. The setting and her clothing remain constant throughout the clip as she remains stationary in front of the camera.
